characters.appearance: A young Indian man in his early 20s with a slim build and a light brown complexion. He has a full head of thick, curly black hair, prominent dark eyebrows, and a clean-shaven face. He has a friendly and expressive face.
characters.wardrobe: Initially wears a white long-sleeved button-down shirt with a faint light blue pattern on the rolled-up cuffs, paired with dark grey trousers. Later, he wears a black long-sleeved button-down shirt. He wears a silver-toned metal link watch on his left wrist throughout.
characters.demeanor: Starts off nervous and makes a mistake, leading to embarrassment and regret. He then becomes thoughtful and reflective, and finally transitions to being confident, friendly, and encouraging.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: And from here, I goes here...
Unknown speaker says: Abey, 'I goes' nahi hota, 'I go' hota hai. English kab seekhega?
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hook: Relatable Indian-English error in a high-stakes setting.
- Emotion: Embarrassment/Shame.
- Payload: Names English immediately (within 10s).
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
And From Here I Goes Here
Abey, 'I Goes' Nahi Hota
'I Go' Hota Hai
English Kab Seekhega?

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says (voiceover): Yaar, kaash maine pehle hi Supernova app download kar liya hota.
Character A says (voiceover): Isme Miss Nova meri personal AI teacher hain.
Character A says (voiceover): Woh pehle mera level samajhti hain, phir sirf mere liye plan banati hain.
Character A says (voiceover): Yahan koi mujhe judge nahi karta.
scenes.scene_summary:
- Purpose: Introduces Supernova and Miss Nova as the solution.
- Emotion: Realization and relief.
- Payload: Lands beat a (Personalization) and beat b (Privacy/no-judgement) early.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Kaash Supernova Download Kiya Hota
Miss Nova: Personal AI Teacher
Custom Plan For Me
Zero Judgement

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says (voiceover): Main raat ke 2 baje 1000 galtiyan karun, toh bhi Miss Nova bina hanse mujhe theek karti hain.
Character A says (voiceover): Isme main sirf padhta nahi, actually English bolta hoon.
Character A says (voiceover): Office presentation ho ya client call, har real-life scenario ki practice hoti hai.
Character A says (voiceover): Aur logic meri hi bhasha mein samjhati hain!
scenes.scene_summary:
- Purpose: Demonstrates the core mechanism of the app while visual shows features.
- Emotion: Confidence building.
- Payload: Reinforces beat b (Privacy), lands beat c (You SPEAK), beat e (Real-life scenarios), and beat g (Logic in your language).
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Make 1000 Mistakes
Learn By SPEAKING
Office & Client Calls
Logic In Your Language

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: But better late than never!
Character A says: Ab main Reels scroll karne mein time waste karne ke bajaye, roz 15 minute Supernova par English bolne ki practice karta hoon.
Character A says: Aap bhi aaj hi Supernova install karein, aur confidently bolna shuru karein!
scenes.scene_summary:
- Purpose: Dignity restored, strong call to action.
- Emotion: Triumphant and encouraging.
- Payload: Tight close with negative time anchor (Reels), positive time anchor (15 min/day), and a clear install CTA.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Better Late Than Never
Stop Scrolling Reels
Practice 15 Mins/Day
Install Supernova Today

payload_audit.beats_covered: a (Personalization), b (Privacy/no-judgement), c (You SPEAK), e (Real-life scenarios), g (Logic in own language)
payload_audit.kept_from_seed: Presentation mistake hook, regret transition, app demo, confident talking-head close
